descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes lead B.C. Junior Hockey League championship playoff series 4-0 against Kelowna Packers after 5-1 win Saturday.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes are poised to sweep the B.C. Junior Hockey League championship playoff series against the Kelowna Packers, holding a 4-0 lead after a 5-1 victory in Kelowna on Saturday. Coach Orland Kurtenbach expressed confidence ahead of Tuesday's decisive game at Richmond Arena. Jason Philips scored a short-handed goal and added another, with Dave Tomlinson and others contributing as Richmond scored three unanswered goals in the final period.
